summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier domain specialist with one of the strongest single-domain track records in the system: 92.8% accuracy across 1,025 Russia-Ukraine trades is a genuine and exploitable edge. Trump_US performance (74.2%, 449 trades) is also strong. However, the trader loses catastrophically outside these domains — a 9.2% win rate across 502 'Other' trades is worse than random and suggests severe overconfidence or information deficit when moving beyond core expertise. The recent Harris loss sequence, involving 15+ averaged-down positions on a single market, highlights a sunk-cost behaviour risk that could cause significant drawdowns. Follow this trader exclusively in Russia_UKR and Trump_US; discard all other signals.
